narrative: Strait of Hormuz clashes and retaliatory strikes on Iranian energy hubs drive a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges toward $96.0; USD/JPY holds at 156.65 as the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry persists despite the regional shock. NZD/CAD leads G8 divergence (spread 1.551%) as softer Canadian jobs data and climbing energy costs weigh on CAD. Gold steady +0.02% near $4,712; equities +0.74%; DXY -0.14%; VIX 17.3. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
